channel.title: UAE on mlai.ae | Vertical AI Consulting UAE — Build & Operate Custom AI Models
channel.description: Recent content in UAE on mlai.ae | Vertical AI Consulting UAE — Build & Operate Custom AI Models

item.title: AI for Fintech UAE: From Fraud Detection to Credit Scoring with Custom Models
item.description: UAE fintech AI use cases, implementation patterns, and CBUAE compliance requirements for custom ML models.

item.title: MLOps in the GCC: Building Production-Grade AI Pipelines for Regulated Industries
item.description: MLOps for UAE regulated industries requires additional compliance layers. Here’s how to build pipelines that satisfy CBUAE and DHA governance requirements.

item.title: Vertical AI in UAE: Why Generic Models Fail and Domain-Specific Ones Win
item.description: Generic foundation models underperform on UAE domain data. Here’s why, and what vertical AI models do differently.
